Title: Murder at the Embassy
Writer: Douglas Beauvois, Mark Brennan, Alex Davison
Actors: Mischa Barton, Richard Dillane, Raha Rahbari
Plot: 1934. A private detective, Miranda Green investigates a murder perpetrated in the British Embassy in Cairo, where a top secret document was stolen, risking to jeopardize both Buckingham Palace and the peace of the world.
